title: NeqSim Agent Manifest
description: Canonical schema for an agent package `agent.yaml` across the NeqSim community and enterprise agent catalogs. This is the single source of truth; the community and enterprise agent repositories vendor an identical copy under their own schemas/ folder and validate against it in CI. Keep the vendored copies byte-for-byte identical to this file (checked by devtools/verify_agent_schema_sync.py in the core repo).

name.description: Stable agent id, kebab-case. Matches the package folder name and the catalog entry name.

version.description: Semantic version. Recommended for every agent; required by the enterprise catalog integrity checks.

items.description: Canonical skill id. Community/core skills use the neqsim- namespace; internal skills use the enterprise- namespace.

required_skills.description: The overlay's own declared skills. For an agent that declares `extends`, the effective skill set is the union of the base agent's required_skills and this list; this list MUST be a superset of the base's required_skills.

agent_type.description: Orchestration role. Skill-less enterprise agents (pure coordinators) MUST declare enterprise-coordinator or enterprise-orchestrator.

extends.description: Declares that this agent is an overlay of a base agent in another catalog. The base agent's required_skills, inputs and outputs are inherited; this agent adds a company policy overlay (extra skills, governance) on top. Used to remove the community<->enterprise near-duplication and to make the linkage machine-checkable.

repo.description: Catalog that hosts the base agent.
